title: gentiana linearis subsp. rubricaulis
intro: Gentiana linearis subsp. rubricaulis, also known as the Red-stemmed Gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Gentiana linearis subsp. rubricaulis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, boost immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Gentiana linearis subsp. rubricaulis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal supplements to support overall health and well-being.
